                                    +-----------+
                                +-->|  Node C1  |
                                |   +-----------+
                  +-----------+ |
              +-->|  Node B3  +-+
              |   +-----------+ |
+-----------+ |                 |
|  Node A1  +-+                 |   +-----------+
+-----------+ |                 +-->|  Node C2  |
              |                 |   +-----------+
              |   +-----------+ |
              +-->|  Node B2  +-+
              |   +-----------+ |
+-----------+ |                 |
|  Node A2  +-+                 |   +-----------+
+-----------+ |                 +-->|  Node C3  |
              |                 |   +-----------+
              |   +-----------+ |
              +-->|  Node B1  +-+
              |   +-----------+
+-----------+ |
|  Node A3  +-+
+-----------+
